title: Tarot Cards
intro: Tarot Cards is a system that lets players open card packs to obtain enchants, random items, and most importantly — pieces for the Doll System and Relics.

figure.alt: Tarot Cards panel showing Common, Rare and Epic cards
figure.caption: The Tarot Cards panel — three card grades, two boss sources, and bulk-open options.

tables.title: Card Grades
tables.preText: Both boss pools share the same three grades. The boss type determines what you get — grade affects the quality of extras alongside the main reward:

cells: Doll pieces + top enchants & special rewards
Relic pieces + top enchants & special rewards

tables.title: Where Cards Drop & What They Give
tables.preText: Cards are split into two pools by boss difficulty. Use the Home and Hard tabs in the panel to switch between them:

cells: Common Normal, Rare Normal, Epic Normal
Common Hard, Rare Hard, Epic Hard

tables.title: Opening Cards
tables.preText: Each card grade supports bulk opening. Select the amount before opening:

infoBoxes.label: Key Rule
infoBoxes.body: **Normal boss cards (all grades) → Dolls.** **Hard boss cards (all grades) → Relics.** Higher grade cards within the same pool give better enchants and extra items alongside the Doll or Relic piece.

infoBoxes.label: Check Rewards First
infoBoxes.body: Click the **?** button next to any card grade to preview the full reward table before opening — useful for planning which boss type to farm.

specialRewards.title: Special Rewards
specialRewards.preText: Beyond Doll and Relic pieces, Tarot Cards can yield:
items: **Weapon enchant scrolls** — upgrade your weapon's enchant level
**Armor enchant scrolls** — upgrade your armor's enchant level
Various other items depending on card grade and current event pool
